title: MBS-Lang expanded Azure provider evidence summary
evidence_boundary: Real provider behavior evidence only for the listed 15-row multilingual schema, cases, languages, deployment, decoding mode, gate thresholds, and run settings. This is not broad multilingual reliability or translation-quality evidence.
raw_provider_outputs_reason: Raw provider JSONL remains in ignored local results paths unless separately scrubbed and intentionally released.

rows.interpretation: Expanded 15-row multilingual provider gate failed because one Arabic tool-call-safety row triggered provider content filtering. The other rows were traceable and the aggregate schema/semantic/clean-JSON rates were 0.9333. This is useful provider behavior evidence, not an MBS infrastructure failure and not a pass claim.

non_claims: Does not claim universal multilingual model reliability.
Does not evaluate translation quality independently of the structured risk-review task.
Does not publish raw provider outputs.
Does not include OSS/HPC model behavior evidence.
Does not mark the expanded provider gate as passing.
